# ɳTask Brand Pack

Brand assets for **ɳTask** — Free, open-source task management, built on nSelf.

All assets use the canonical nSelf color palette from
`~/Sites/nself/.claude/docs/brand/color-theme-standard.md`.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `favicon.ico` | Browser tab icon |
| `icon.png` | Square app icon (512×512) |
| `icon-maskable.png` | Maskable icon with 10% safe zone padding |
| `logo.png` | Horizontal logo |
| `icons/` | All icon sizes: 16/32/48/64/96/128/192/256/512/1024/2048px |

## Colors

Primary gradient: sky-500 `#0ea5e9` → blue-600 `#2563eb`
Background: gray-950 `#030712`
Logo mark: light cyan `#AAE4FF` → sky-blue `#38BDF8`

## Source

Assets derived from nSelf master icons at `.claude/docs/brand/icons/` (PPI level).
Adapted for ɳTask using canonical sky-blue palette.

**Generated:** 2026-04-20 (S61 sprint)
